_doc: Wave-4 late chunking (LLM-free contextual embedding): bge-m3 embeds the whole document in 8192-token windows, then each chunk is mean-pooled from its tokens' CONTEXTUAL hidden states (Jina late chunking). sparse=BM25 over the deterministic header field; header ON. Only the dense doc/query vector differs from w4-lc-bge-m3-naive. Tests whether document context without an LLM recovers the w4-llm-all contextual-retrieval win.
